_comment: Known-bad GPU driver versions for Bannerlord+TOR. Match by vendor (substring of GPU.Name) and exact driver version (Win32_VideoController.DriverVersion). When a row matches, surface the card with severity='warning' and the human-readable reason. Update this list when new bad drivers come out — bug report channel: t.me/CodeRickTg.

_source_format.vendor_match: Substring case-insensitive matched against GPU.Name. Use 'NVIDIA' / 'AMD' / 'Intel'.
_source_format.driver_version: Exact match against Win32_VideoController.DriverVersion (e.g. '31.0.15.5222'). For range matches use a list of versions.
_source_format.reason_en: One-line human reason. Why this driver is bad.
_source_format.fix_en: Recommended action ('upgrade to N+' / 'roll back to N-')

drivers.reason_en: NVIDIA Game Ready 526.86 — known TDR / DXGI_ERROR_DEVICE_HUNG cascade in TOR shader compilation.
drivers.reason_ru: NVIDIA Game Ready 526.86 — известная серия TDR / DXGI_ERROR_DEVICE_HUNG при компиляции шейдеров TOR.
drivers.reason_zh: NVIDIA Game Ready 526.86 — 在 TOR 着色器编译时已知的 TDR / DXGI_ERROR_DEVICE_HUNG 连锁故障。
drivers.reason_tr: NVIDIA Game Ready 526.86 — TOR gölgelendirici derlemesinde bilinen TDR / DXGI_ERROR_DEVICE_HUNG zinciri.
drivers.fix_en: Upgrade to 528.02 or newer via NVIDIA app / GeForce Experience.
drivers.fix_ru: Обнови до 528.02 или новее через NVIDIA app / GeForce Experience.
drivers.fix_zh: 通过 NVIDIA app / GeForce Experience 升级到 528.02 或更新版本。
drivers.fix_tr: NVIDIA app / GeForce Experience üzerinden 528.02 veya daha yenisine yükselt.

drivers.reason_en: AMD Adrenalin 24.10.1 — reported CreateShaderResourceView failures during TOR siege battles.
drivers.reason_ru: AMD Adrenalin 24.10.1 — отчёты про CreateShaderResourceView fail в осадных битвах TOR.
drivers.reason_zh: AMD Adrenalin 24.10.1 — 在 TOR 攻城战中报告的 CreateShaderResourceView 失败。
drivers.reason_tr: AMD Adrenalin 24.10.1 — TOR kuşatma savaşlarında bildirilen CreateShaderResourceView hataları.
drivers.fix_en: Roll back to 24.9.1 via Adrenalin Settings → Updates → Previous, or upgrade to 24.10.2+.
drivers.fix_ru: Откатись на 24.9.1 через Adrenalin → Настройки → Обновления → Предыдущая, или обнови до 24.10.2+.
drivers.fix_zh: 通过 Adrenalin 设置 → 更新 → 上一版本回滚到 24.9.1，或升级到 24.10.2+。
drivers.fix_tr: Adrenalin Ayarları → Güncellemeler → Önceki üzerinden 24.9.1'e geri dön veya 24.10.2+ sürümüne yükselt.
